label: VNP46A2
case: Retrieve NPP VIIRS VNP46A2 daily NTL data for Shanghai, from January 1 to January 7, 2020.

label: Administrative boundary
case: Retrieve Shanghai's administrative boundary from Amap.

label: SDGSAT-1 NDIGR
case: Calculate NDIGR using the SDGSAT-1 GLI image at inputs/.

label: Point statistics
case: Identify the WGS84 coordinate of the brightest pixel of NPP-VIIRS NTL imagery in Shanghai, 2022.

label: Minimum NTL intensity [MinNTL]
case: Calculate minimum NTL intensity of  NPP-VIIRS-like annual NTL image for each district in Shanghai, 2020.

label: ANTL [ANTL]
case: Calculate ANTL of  NPP-VIIRS-like annual NTL image for each district in Shanghai, 2020.

label: Digital economy index [DEI]
case: Please read the 2022 DEI data for the top 20 Chinese cities from inputs\DEI_1_20.xlsx, retrieve the corresponding 2022 ANTL values by matching city names, analyze the relationship between ANTL and DEI, and fit a regression model for analysis.

label: Population
case: Please retrieve the NPP VIIRS NTL imagery and LandScan imagery from 2013 to 2023, compute the annual ANTL and total population for each year, analyze the relationship between ANTL and total population.

label: Urban main roads extraction
case: Extract urban main roads based on the SDGSAT-1 GLI NTL imagery located at inputs\SDG_rgb.tif, and convert the result to a shapefile (.shp).
